channel.title: XANVOR — Hand-Hammered Brass & Metal Homeware
channel.description: Hand-finished metal homeware from Moradabad, India. Food warmers, hot-pots and serving domes in solid brass and steel. A house brand of Zenko Inc.

item.g:title: Maharaja Grand Serving Dome — Solid Brass · XANVOR
item.g:description: A spun-brass dome on a seigaiha cut-work pedestal, crowned by a detachable arched carry handle. Built for the banquet table. Solid brass, single-wall. Hand-hammered dome. Jali (seigaiha) cut-work base. Detachable carry handle. Banquet / buffet scale Sizes: Ø34 / Ø38 / Ø42 cm (rep: Ø38). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Imperial Two-Tone Conical Hot-Pot — Gold PVD body · XANVOR
item.g:description: A two-tone insulated hot-pot — a mirror gold-PVD body crowned by a hand-hammered steel-mirror conical lid. The everyday workhorse of the collection. Double-wall, insulated. PVD-gold body. Hammered steel conical lid. Food-safe SS304 inner Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Aurum Gold Satin Hot-Pot — Mirror Gold PVD (smooth) · XANVOR
item.g:description: The quiet one. A smooth mirror gold-PVD body and conical lid, with nothing to distract from the shine — the most affordable way into the gold range. Mirror PVD-gold. Smooth conical lid. Food-safe SS304 inner. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Sultana Royal Dome Hot-Pot — Mirror Gold PVD · XANVOR
item.g:description: A rounded hand-hammered dome lid in mirror gold-PVD — softer and more regal than the cone, for the table that wants a little drama. Hand-hammered dome lid. Mirror PVD-gold. Double-wall, insulated. Food-safe SS304 inner Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Sterling Steel-Mirror Hot-Pot — Steel Mirror · XANVOR
item.g:description: Cool SS304 steel-mirror, hand-hammered body and lid, lifted by warm gold-PVD cast handles — a contemporary two-metal look. SS304 mirror finish. Hand-hammered body + lid. Gold-PVD cast handles. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Sheesham Wood-Finish Hot-Pot — Rosewood heat-transfer · XANVOR
item.g:description: A warm rosewood-grain heat-transfer body under a mirror gold-PVD conical lid — the wood look without the upkeep of real timber. Wood-grain heat-transfer. PVD-gold conical lid. Food-safe SS304 inner. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Thermalock 28 Lock-System Food Warmer — Mango-wood body · XANVOR
item.g:description: Real mango-wood, true insulation, and a brass hammered lid that locks shut with clamps — carry it from kitchen to table without a spill. Mango-wood outer shell. SS304 mirror inner liner. Brass hammered lid. Lock-clamp system. Keeps food hot for hours Sizes: Ø22 / Ø25 / Ø28 cm (rep: Ø28). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Carrara Marble-Finish Hot-Pot — Marble heat-transfer · XANVOR
item.g:description: A pale Carrara marble-grain heat-transfer body with gold-PVD conical lid and handles — cool stone against warm metal. Marble heat-transfer finish. PVD-gold conical lid + handles. Double-wall, insulated. Food-safe SS304 inner Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Botanica Leaf & Vine Hot-Pot — Mirror Gold PVD · XANVOR
item.g:description: Mirror gold-PVD wrapped with a cast leaf-and-vine applique and a floral finial — ornamental serveware for festive tables. Cast leaf / vine applique. Floral finial. Mirror PVD-gold. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: 1500 / 2500 ml (rep: 2000 ml, Ø20). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Florentine Floral-Luxe Hot-Pot — Mirror Gold PVD · XANVOR
item.g:description: The most ornate of the range — ornate floral cast handles and a floral cast knob on a mirror gold-PVD body. A statement for the gifting shelf. Ornate floral cast handles. Floral cast knob. Mirror PVD-gold. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: 1500 / 2500 / 3500 ml (rep: 2500 ml, Ø22). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Darbar Low-Profile Serving Dish — Mirror Gold PVD · XANVOR
item.g:description: A low matka-profile sharing dish with a flat bar-handle lid in mirror gold-PVD — built for biryani, curries and the centre of the table. Low matka profile. Bar-handle flat lid. Mirror PVD-gold. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: Ø24 / Ø28 cm (rep: Ø26). Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware

item.g:title: Trinity Hammered Casserole — Set of 3 — Gold / Copper PVD · XANVOR
item.g:description: A graded set of three hand-hammered casseroles in gold and copper PVD — small, medium and large, nested from starter to main. Set of 3 · Ø18 / 22 / 26. Gold / copper PVD. Hand-hammered lids. Double-wall, insulated Sizes: Set of 3 · Ø18 + Ø22 + Ø26 cm. Hand-hammered in Moradabad, India.
item.g:google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Tableware > Serveware
